name: Missing Force
name_jp: はぐれ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もの</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>傭</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>部</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control no other monsters: You can Tribute this card to target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of that target until the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon or conduct your Battle Phase during the turn you activate this effect.
mnst_eff: If you control no other monsters: You can Tribute this card to target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of that target until the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon or conduct your Battle Phase during the turn you activate this effect.
eff: If you control no other monsters: You can Tribute this card to target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of that target until the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon or conduct your Battle Phase during the turn you activate this effect.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
misc: Requires control of no other monsters
